title: Invisible Armor for Players (Only)
description: Makes armor invisible for only players, not mobs nor armor stands. Has conditionals to force visibility.
body: ## Purpose Allows players to see and enjoy their skins, without interfering with survival mechanics and gameplay. ## Dependencies [](https://modrinth.com/mod/chime) ## Description With Chime mod loaded, this makes armor invisible when the players wear it, but visible if on anything else (mobs or armor stands). When visible, armor will still show any other changes made to it by other resource packs. If Chime is not loaded, this pack will do nothing. ### Force Visibility The armor can become visible on players too by renaming it. ### Force Invisibility The armor can be forced to be always invisible, whether renamed or on a non-player entity, by: 1. Including "Invisible" in its name (case insensitive) 2. Ending the name with an underscore (_). So, for example, the following names would force invisibility on both the player and any other entity that wears it: - Invisible Crown_ - inVISible Ruby Chestplate - Pants that are invisible - The Greatest Boots_ ## License [Attribution-NonCommercial-ShareAlike 4.0 International](https://creativecommons.org/licenses/by-nc-sa/4.0/)
